# harness_fme_traffic_type (Resource)

Create and delete a Harness FME (Split) traffic type. Import id format: `org_id/project_id/traffic_type_id`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Traffic type name.
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.

### Optional

- `display_attribute_id` (String) Optional display attribute ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `traffic_type_id` (String) The Split traffic type ID (same as `id`).
